model.name: Finance Reporting
model.description: Finance Reporting semantic model for the Power BI Enterprise PoC. Implements actuals vs budget variance analysis with P&L measures, fiscal calendar support, and multi-entity structure.

fact_tables.name: FactActuals
fact_tables.source: Simulated M query (replace with ERP connection in production)
fact_tables.grain: One row per general ledger journal entry line

fact_tables.name: FactBudget
fact_tables.source: Simulated M query (replace with planning system connection in production)
fact_tables.grain: One row per account-department-period-entity budget allocation

dimension_tables.name: DimPeriod
dimension_tables.source: Generated via M query (April fiscal year, 2021-2026)

utility_tables.name: _FinanceMeasures
utility_tables.description: Hidden utility table containing all 20 DAX finance measures

relationships.note: FactBudget relationships are inactive. The Budget measure uses CALCULATE with USERELATIONSHIP implicitly via the _FinanceMeasures DAX patterns.

production_readiness.replace_fact_actuals_source: Connect to ERP system (SAP, Oracle, Dynamics) via certified connector
production_readiness.replace_fact_budget_source: Connect to planning tool (Anaplan, Workday Adaptive, Excel) or data warehouse
production_readiness.add_fx_conversion: Add a FactFXRates table and FX conversion measures for multi-currency consolidation
production_readiness.add_entity_rls: Implement USERPRINCIPALNAME()-based RLS on DimEntity for controlled entity visibility
